eventLog: Hunt travels to village.

Hunt

Action: Attack,Outcome: Invalid,Target: None

There is nothing here to attack.
Hunt attempts a ruthless execution strike.
Hunt attempts: "Execute"
Hunt travels to bar.
[EVENT — VILLAGE] A pair of villagers lower their voices when they see a guard pass nearby. The street troubles are being discussed.
Hunt travels to village.
[EVENT — STREET] A horse panics. A loaded cart jerks loose and barrels down the street.
The guards interpret the silence as guilt and grow even more suspicious.
Hunt travels to street.
Hunt searches the forest and gathers 1 wood.

activeEvent.name: Runaway Cart
activeEvent.text: A horse panics. A loaded cart jerks loose and barrels down the street.

recentHistory: [EVENT — STREET] A horse panics. A loaded cart jerks loose and barrels down the street.
The guards interpret the silence as guilt and grow even more suspicious.
[EVENT — STREET] A town guard plants a spear in your path and demands to know what you’re up to.
Hunt waits and watches the world move around them.
